name: Mike Nagy Golf Instruction
about: Mike Nagy Golf Instruction is a premium golf coaching facility located at TPC Wisconsin in Madison, offering year-round instruction for juniors and adults. The facility utilizes advanced technology, including TrackMan and high-speed video analysis, to provide data-driven coaching tailored to individual goals and skill levels. Coaching philosophy emphasizes a holistic approach, integrating physical and mental training, with options for one-on-one lessons and group sessions for up to six people.
why_golfers_like_it: Elite-level instruction from a professional golfer and D1 coach
Comprehensive technology with TrackMan and video analysis
Personalized coaching plans for all skill levels
Junior golf and college recruiting expertise

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentions TrackMan as a primary coaching tool

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, it is standard practice for personal golf lessons to bring your own clubs. Club rentals may be available on-site.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information is provided on BYOB policies or food and drink services at the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue focuses on instruction and training, not on full simulator play. 18-hole simulation time would depend on the individual's pace and purpose for the session.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers specialized junior golf programs and coaching for beginners of all ages, providing a non-intimidating environment to start the game.
